cookies.banner_body: We use technical cookies necessary for the website to function and, with your consent, third-party analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to understand how the site is used in anonymous and aggregated form. You can accept, reject or customise your choice. More details in the
cookies.cat_technical_body: Necessary for the website to function (language preferences, consent management, admin session). They do not require consent pursuant to art. 122 of the Italian Privacy Code.
cookies.cat_analytics_body: Google Analytics 4 with anonymised IP. They help us understand how the website is used. Activated only with your explicit consent.
